description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black exterior accented by red highlights and angular, stealth-inspired contours. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated smoothly into the fuselage, giving the aircraft a delta-like appearance. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed with a dark canopy, suggesting advanced avionics and pilot protection. The rear of the airplane features twin vertical stabilizers and what appear to be jet engine exhausts, indicating a high-performance propulsion system. The surface finish is glossy with some visible wear, and the overall design is compact yet aggressive, likely optimized for speed and maneuverability. No visible landing gear is present, implying it may be retractable or designed for display.
description: A futuristic, black and red, delta-wing airplane with a forward cockpit, twin vertical stabilizers, and a glossy, stealth-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular fuselage, integrated wing, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, dual jet exhausts, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, swept wing, and rear stabilizer configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted with visible exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a canted configuration, forming a V-tail-like appearance.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or not modeled.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
